chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2197 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.10705/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on CMA No.10706/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.10707/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 26.05.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Gabol, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5. This is a petition alleging harassment and the same could not be entertained in view of a Division Bench judgment of this court reported as PLD 2019 Sindh 168. In mutatis mutandis application of ratio thereof, this petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed in limie. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
